name: ccm_auto_billing
description: Ingests CCM/PCM phone call data, creates encounter notes with billing line items (99490/99424), and auto-routes claims to the submission queue.

protocols.description: HTTP endpoint that ingests CCM call data, creates a Canvas encounter note with HPI/assess/plan/goal commands and a CPT billing line item (99490 or 99424).
Listens for CLAIM_CREATED events and auto-routes CCM/PCM claims to QUEUED_FOR_SUBMISSION.
When a CCM encounter note is locked, links assessment IDs as diagnosis pointers on the billing line item to resolve claim validation errors.
